specify.scoreSource: state-goals.json L175 only — check-level JSON not on disk
specify.checkBreakdown: UNVERIFIABLE — G-003-specify-score.json absent (artifacts/MOD-GRID-02/state/ contains G-001/G-002 specify-score.json but not G-003). Reported sub-100 attribution to A-04 in main prompt is recall, not file evidence.
specify.metaGates: H-01/H-02/H-03 ALL YES per spec.md L737/L749/L761 self-attestation. Independent Verifier confirmation absent.

implement.model: sonnet (Implementer) → haiku (Coverage Verifier per verifierModel L149)
implement.verifierIndependence: implement-score.json L150 explicitly states 'Coverage Verifier independent re-check (C-11 mandate). Implementer self-claim ignored; all judgments based on file:line evidence from Read/Grep tools.' This is the FIRST G-NNN-implement-score.json in MOD-GRID-02 to carry verifierModel + verifierIndependence metadata — G-001 and G-002 implement-score.json files have no such field (those were Implementer self-written per G-001-self-review L10 'model: sonnet' and G-002-self-review L10 'model: sonnet').

missingSpecifyScoreJson.evidence: Disk inventory of artifacts/MOD-GRID-02/state/ — G-001-specify-score.json + G-002-specify-score.json present, G-003-specify-score.json ABSENT. state-goals.json G-003.stages.specify.score=97.5 + status='done' but no backing JSON.
missingSpecifyScoreJson.implication: (a) Self-Review cannot verify which check produced sub-100 score. Main prompt's claim of 'A-04 NO 1건' is recall-based, not disk-evidence. (b) Audit trail incomplete — future drift investigation lacks per-check evidence. (c) Specify-rubric F自기-검산 (C-26) cannot be re-applied without check-level data.
missingSpecifyScoreJson.rootCauseHypothesis: Specify Verifier output may have been consumed by orchestrator state update without persistence to file. Or specify Verifier was main-direct (C-15 violation) and did not produce a JSON artifact. Either way, the JSON-write step in SPECIFY pipeline is non-enforced.
missingSpecifyScoreJson.actionRequired: Tooling-side fix — ensure specify-score.json write is mandatory before state-goals.json status='done' transition. Out-of-scope for self-review APPLY but logged in cascading risks.

implementerSelfScoreInversionFromPromptN.promptClaim: Main prompt asserted 'Implementer self-score 작성 = C-15 위반 가능성' + 'independent haiku Coverage Verifier가 재검증하여 차단 성공'.
implementerSelfScoreInversionFromPromptN.actualFinding: Inverted. G-003-implement-score.json verifierModel='haiku' + verifierIndependence wording prove THIS IS the Coverage Verifier output, NOT an Implementer self-write that was caught. The C-15 process worked correctly here.
implementerSelfScoreInversionFromPromptN.actualGap: G-001 and G-002 implement-score.json files have NO verifierModel field. G-001-self-review L10 records 'model: sonnet' for implement stage and G-002-self-review L10 same. Those WERE Implementer-self-written — the actual C-15 medium-tier procedure gap is in the prior 2 Goals, not G-003.
implementerSelfScoreInversionFromPromptN.interpretation: G-003 represents the FIRST correct application of C-15 medium-tier Coverage Verifier separation in MOD-GRID-02 — process maturation, not violation. Prior 2 Goals' implement-score.json metadata absence is a retrospective C-15 finding for MOD-GRID-02 G-001/G-002.
implementerSelfScoreInversionFromPromptN.implication: Improvement candidate B (newly proposed C-30 'block Implementer self-score') is misframed — C-15 already mandates haiku Coverage Verifier for medium tier. The discovery is that orchestrator was not enforcing it; G-003 enforced it correctly. No new constraint needed; instead surface this as harness-process retrospective.

specViolation.pattern: if (ms <= 0) return fn; THEN return useCallback(...) — useCallback called conditionally after early return → React Rules of Hooks violation (TS no error, but ESLint react-hooks/rules-of-hooks reports + production runtime invariant).
specViolation.specSelfContradiction: spec Section 11.3 위험 표 본문 명시: 'useRef/useEffect는 항상 먼저 호출 후 if (ms <= 0) return fn' — spec writer recognized the pattern but Step 2 code template did NOT apply it correctly to useCallback.

implementationFix.actualOrder: L51 useRef → L52 useEffect → L57 useRef → L60 useEffect → L70 useCallback (UNCONDITIONAL) → L85 if (ms <= 0) return fn → L89 return debounced
implementationFix.judgment: Implementer correctly hoisted useCallback BEFORE the early return — Rules of Hooks compliant. Implementation is safe.

c27Violation.specRequiredAction: C-27 mandate: spec drift findings → promptSpecDrift[] entry + feedback 1-line summary
c27Violation.actualBehavior: implement-score.json promptSpecDrift=[] (L120). feedback (L142 'implementationQuality') claims 'Rules of Hooks structure (unconditional useRef/useEffect/useCallback before ms<=0 return) follows D6 + Section 11.3 pattern exactly' — but spec Step 2 code template L508-524 does NOT exactly match (useCallback was AFTER early return in spec, BEFORE in implementation).
c27Violation.judgment: Implementer silently fixed spec code defect but did NOT report it as drift. Coverage Verifier (haiku) feedback inaccurately claims 'follows Section 11.3 pattern exactly' — but Section 11.2 (the actual code template Implementer was instructed to follow) has the bug. Section 11.3 is mitigation prose, not the executable template.
c27Violation.severity: C-27 procedural violation — drift was real (spec code ≠ implementation order) but not surfaced. Coverage Verifier missed it because evidence focused on identifier presence, not statement order.

rulesOfHooksImplementerSilentFix.implication: Real-world incident — first observed instance in MOD-GRID-02 of Implementer auto-fixing spec code defect without C-27 reporting. Spec Section 11.3 prose helped Implementer recognize the issue, but the gap between Section 11.3 (prose) and Section 11.2 (executable code template) was Implementer's call alone. This is a Pattern Catalog Note candidate.

thirdHookProfileDataPoint.G-001: +0.12 KB (pure pass-through hook — 8x useState wiring, no JSX)
thirdHookProfileDataPoint.G-002: +0.23 KB (controlled-aware hook — useControllableState NEW + snapshotRef + 8 wiring)
thirdHookProfileDataPoint.G-003: +0.74 KB (verify-score L22 reports 25.75 KB vs G-002 implement-score-claimed 25.03 KB baseline; +0.72 KB delta verified per verify-score L69)
thirdHookProfileDataPoint.subProfile: hook+helper+ref+timeout — useDebouncedCallback NEW (90 LOC) with useRef×2 + useEffect×2 + useCallback + setTimeout cleanup boilerplate
thirdHookProfileDataPoint.spread: 0.12 → 0.23 → 0.72 KB (6x range across 3 hook sub-profiles within same module)
thirdHookProfileDataPoint.extrapolationBlocked: spec D7 (L23) explicit: 'G-001 실측 +0.12 KB, G-002 실측 +0.23 KB 으로부터 G-003 예측 금지. ADR-MOD-GRID-00-010 §extrapolation 금지 룰 적용. goals.json 참조치 +1 KB 사용. 실측은 implement 직후 size-limit 측정.' Confirmed actual implementation deferred to size-limit measurement — verify-score L69 reports 25.75 KB实측.
thirdHookProfileDataPoint.datapointAccumulation: ADR-MOD-GRID-00-010 hook-profile section now warrants 3rd row. 3 occurrences within MOD-GRID-02 alone — extrapolation block rule has empirical support across full module.
thirdHookProfileDataPoint.adrAction: ADR-MOD-GRID-00-010 matrix update — hook profile sub-profile rows: pure pass-through (G-001 6%) / controlled-aware (G-002 11.5%) / hook+helper+ref+timeout (G-003 ~74% if measured against goals.json +1 KB expected vs 0.74 KB actual).

improvementCandidates.title: specify-rubric A-04 명확화 — 0개 사용처 명시 시 spec 본문에 '0개' literal 명시 의무 (boundary case 정확화)
improvementCandidates.reason: Cannot verify A-04 is the failing check — G-003-specify-score.json absent. Main prompt's recall-claim of 'A-04 NO 1건' lacks file evidence. Spec L101 (Section 1.4) DOES literally state '0개' + Section 8.1 L340 also '0개'. If A-04 was scored NO, that judgment is itself questionable. APPLY would build on unverified premise. Defer to next sub-100 SPECIFY occurrence with intact specify-score.json for evidence-grounded rubric refinement.

improvementCandidates.title: constraints C-30 신설 — Implementer는 implement-score 작성 금지 (Coverage Verifier 전용)
improvementCandidates.reason: Misframed per main-prompt premise reversal. C-15 already mandates Coverage Verifier (haiku) for medium-tier implement scoring — see C-15 table 'Coverage Verifier | haiku'. G-003 implement-score.json verifierModel='haiku' + verifierIndependence proves THIS run correctly applied C-15. The actual gap is that G-001 + G-002 implement-score.json files have NO verifierModel field (Implementer self-wrote — visible in G-001-self-review L10 'model: sonnet' and G-002 same). The proper response is harness-process enforcement (orchestrator must invoke separate haiku Verifier instance for every medium-tier implement) — not a new constraint. Logged as cascading risk R-2 instead.

improvementCandidates.title: implement-rubric F-XX 신설 — spec 코드 결함 발견 시 Implementer 자율 정정 + finding 보고 의무 (Rules of Hooks 사례 일반화)
improvementCandidates.reason: Real evidence: useDebouncedCallback.ts L70 hoists useCallback BEFORE the L85 early return — implementer DID silently fix spec Section 11.2 (L508-524) Rules-of-Hooks defect. promptSpecDrift=[] in implement-score.json (L120) means Coverage Verifier did not catch the drift either. C-27 covers prompt-vs-spec drift (메인 prompt drift) — but does NOT explicitly cover spec-내부-결함 (spec Step 2 template buggy 코드). This is a 1st-occurrence Pattern Catalog Note (anecdote) per 1=anecdote, 2=pattern, 3=policy rule — but the severity (Rules of Hooks = production correctness invariant) and the fact that it was caught only via Self-Review post-hoc Read inspection, not by Coverage Verifier, justifies APPLY at anecdote stage. Rule scope: 'spec code template defect (compilable but semantically wrong) discovery → Implementer auto-fix + implement-score.specCodeDefects[] entry + 1-line feedback'.
improvementCandidates.appliedTo: implement-rubric.md F-06 신설 (or similar — spec internal code defect reporting). Reference Pattern Catalog Note in ADR-MOD-GRID-02-NEW (per-module ADR for first occurrence — promotion to constraints.md C-NN deferred until 2nd occurrence).

improvementCandidates.title: ADR-MOD-GRID-00-010 갱신 — hook profile 3rd sub-profile 추가 (hook+helper+ref+timeout ~74% efficiency)
improvementCandidates.reason: Primary evidence: G-003 actual +0.72 KB (verify-score L69 25.75 KB - 25.03 KB baseline) vs goals.json expected +1 KB → ~72-74% efficiency. Spread across 3 hook sub-profiles within MOD-GRID-02: pure pass-through (G-001 6%) / controlled-aware (G-002 11.5%) / hook+helper+ref+timeout (G-003 ~74%) — 12x efficiency variance. ADR-010 own policy (§결과 3) explicitly invites '신규 profile 발견 시 본 ADR 매트릭스에 데이터포인트 추가'. 3 hook-sub-profile data points within single module empirically validate extrapolation-blocking rule. Sub-profile differentiation captures useDebouncedCallback boilerplate (useRef×2 + useEffect×2 + useCallback + setTimeout cleanup = ~90 LOC NEW + 8 wiring sites in useGridState.ts MODIFY) categorically distinct from prior 2 hook patterns.
improvementCandidates.appliedTo: decisions/MOD-GRID-00-decisions.md ADR-MOD-GRID-00-010 matrix — add hook-only sub-profile row #3 'hook+helper+ref+timeout' G-003 ~74% efficiency. Update 'hook sub-profile 분리 근거' section with G-003 data point.

rejectionRationaleSummary: A (A-04 명확화): cannot anchor to verifiable check evidence — G-003-specify-score.json absent + spec body literal '0개' present; APPLY would build on unverified premise. B (Implementer self-score 금지): premise inverted — C-15 already mandates haiku for medium-tier implement; G-003 is FIRST correct application, not a violation. Real gap is G-001+G-002 missed haiku step (logged as R-2).

cascadingRisks.description: G-003-specify-score.json missing on disk while state-goals.json reports score=97.5. Tooling pipeline does not enforce specify-score JSON write before status='done'. Future Goals may also lack check-level evidence — Self-Review cannot reconstruct sub-100 attribution.
cascadingRisks.mitigation: Tooling-side: orchestrator should refuse state-goals.json stages.specify.status='done' transition unless artifacts/{MOD}/state/{Goal}-specify-score.json file write succeeds. Out-of-scope for ADR — propose in /tw-grid loop tooling backlog.

cascadingRisks.description: MOD-GRID-02 G-001 + G-002 implement-score.json files have NO verifierModel field — likely Implementer-self-written without separate haiku Coverage Verifier invocation. C-15 medium-tier table mandates haiku for Coverage Verifier on every implement. G-003 is first run with verifierModel='haiku' metadata. Risk: prior 2 Goals' implement scores may have inflated false positives (Implementer self-claim never independently checked).
cascadingRisks.mitigation: Retroactive: skip — those Goals also passed independent opus Verify (5축 100 each) which catches gross errors. Forward: orchestrator must explicitly invoke separate haiku subagent for every medium-tier implement-score generation + reject implement-score.json files lacking verifierModel field. Document in ADR-MOD-GRID-00-011 as 'medium tier process maturation observation' (G-003 first compliant).

cascadingRisks.description: Implementer silent spec-code-defect fix (Rules of Hooks reorder in useDebouncedCallback.ts vs spec L508-524) was not caught by haiku Coverage Verifier — Verifier feedback (implement-score L142) inaccurately claims implementation 'follows Section 11.3 pattern exactly' but conflates Section 11.3 (mitigation prose) with Section 11.2 (executable template that had the bug). Risk: future spec defects of same shape (compilable but Rules-of-Hooks-violating template) may slip through silently if implementer is less rigorous.
cascadingRisks.mitigation: Improvement C APPLY (implement-rubric F-06 spec internal code defect reporting) is the primary mitigation. Additional: Coverage Verifier prompt should require statement-order verification when spec contains Rules-of-Hooks-relevant code (useState/useEffect/useCallback/useMemo/useRef preceding any conditional return). This is a refinement of A-06 (Functional Wire-up Check) extended to hook ordering.

scoreFormulaConsistency.implement: YES18/(18+0)×100=100 ✓ matches reported. yesCount=18 + naCount=6 = 24 ✓ matches rubric v1.0.6 total (A=7+B=7+C=4+D=3+E=3=24). failedChecks=[] consistent with noCount=0.
scoreFormulaConsistency.verify: Σ(100×0.15)+(100×0.20)+(100×0.30)+(100×0.20)+(100×0.15)=100 ✓ matches. yesCount=4 + naCount=12 = 16 ✓ matches rubric v1.0.2 total (A=3+B=5+C=3+D=2+E=3=16). vacuous applied to B (5 N/A — debounce wiring only) + D (2 N/A — affectedUsageFiles=0). A category vacuous-prohibited keyword check (build/tsup/tsc/size-limit) — A-02 'tsc --noEmit 0 errors' + A-03 'tsup PASS + size-limit 25.75 kB' both genuinely YES (not vacuous). C-26 compliance ✓.
scoreFormulaConsistency.specify: UNVERIFIABLE — score JSON absent, formula re-application impossible.

metaValidation.naDenominatorExclusion: implement naCount=6 (A-04/A-07/C-02/D-01/D-02/D-03 + E-02/E-03 — actual count of N/A in JSON = 6 verified). verify naCount=12 (A-01 + B-01..B-05 + C-01/C-02 + D-01/D-02 + E-02/E-03). All correctly excluded from denominator per C-26.
metaValidation.categorySumRubricMatch: implement A7+B7+C4+D3+E3=24 ✓ rubric v1.0.6. verify A3+B5+C3+D2+E3=16 ✓ rubric v1.0.2.
metaValidation.failedChecksIntegrity: implement failedChecks=[] ✓ (no NO). verify failedChecks=[] ✓. specify cannot verify (JSON absent).
metaValidation.vacuousRuleApplication: verify B (debounce wiring — sorting/filter/pagination/virtualization/edit unchanged) + D (affectedUsageFiles=0) vacuous → 100 each. ADR-MOD-GRID-00-002 + verify-rubric vacuous rule correctly applied. A category genuinely scored (A-02 tsc + A-03 size-limit YES — not vacuous despite 'build/tsup/tsc/size-limit' keyword presence in evidence).

adrUpdates: decisions/MOD-GRID-00-decisions.md ADR-MOD-GRID-00-010 (hook profile matrix — 3rd hook sub-profile 'hook+helper+ref+timeout' ~74% efficiency row, G-003 data point)
rubricUpdates: rubric/implement-rubric.md F-06 신설 (spec internal code defect reporting — Rules of Hooks template fix anecdote)
toolingBacklog: Orchestrator must enforce specify-score.json write before state-goals.json status='done' (R-1)
Orchestrator must enforce separate haiku subagent invocation for every medium-tier implement-score (R-2 — verifierModel metadata required)
